title: MANGA NGE Confused about logos on the spine
display_title: MANGA NGE Confused about logos on the spine
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by borolv » Sat Aug 05, 2017 9:35 pm Hey. So I live in Russia, and since Evangelion manga wasn't licensed here (yet) I was looking into buying some Evangelion volumes, the separate ones, not the 3-in-1 editions, for my collection, if I may call it that way. But I was confused when I saw, that sometimes there can be different logos on the spine, an "action" one and the one with a big "V"(stands for Viz I guess). What's the deal here? Since the latter ones are always with the V logo, my guess is that they put it on the newer prints of the old volumes? If so, is there any way of differentiating between those? Especially when buying online, having only the stock image. I really wanted them to look nicely on the shelf, not like on the first pic. I hope you understand. Thanks and sorry for weird English i guess.

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Sat Aug 05, 2017 9:49 pm I actually think you're right, that those ARE the newer prints of the old volumes. The reason I say that, is that if you look at the second picture, the name "khara" only appears on the later volumes. In the first picture, however, it appears on the first few as well. This is because the company khara (IIRC) only got the rights relatively recently.

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 06, 2017 1:13 am borolv wrote: What's the deal here?

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by borolv » Sun Aug 06, 2017 10:45 am Thanks. I guess I can only hope that nowadays mostly new prints are sold. Doesn't hurt to try

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 06, 2017 11:00 am You'll note that even the V volumes may have khara or not, and may have khara or Gainax first. The chances of getting complete uniformity are pretty low!

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Sun Aug 06, 2017 12:08 pm Just, btw, there're 14 volumes in manga. And, vol.14 of one pic seems to be in JP.

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 06, 2017 12:21 pm That stand came as the special item with the 14th Japanese volume. The Viz volumes are slightly thicker, so only 13 of the English volumes fit in it.

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 06, 2017 1:21 pm What is it with manga localizers who can't seem to grasp the basic concept that actual human beings buy the manga and display them on shelves? Fuck aesthetic uniformity -- just GOTTA change the icons for no discernible reason! At least with the Eva volumes, it's nowhere near as bad as it is with Berserk, where the visual elements not only change but vertically shift around.

[]: Re: [MANGA] [NGE] Confused about logos on the spine             Quote Post by borolv » Sun Aug 06, 2017 2:38 pm pwhodges wrote: volumes may have khara or not, and may have khara or Gainax first
